understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate through grid-based levels, matching the shape, color, and rotation of your carried piece to the requirements of highlighted goal cells. Stepping onto a goal cell with the correct attributes completes it. Completing all goal cells in a level advances you to the next, and completing all levels wins the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: You start with a piece that has a shape, color, and rotation. The grid contains modifier tiles that change your piece's attributes when stepped on: shape modifiers cycle the shape, color modifiers cycle the color, and rotation modifiers rotate the piece 90° clockwise. Goal cells specify required shape, color, and rotation that must all match simultaneously. You move in four directions (north, south, east, west), each move consuming stamina. Running out of stamina costs a life, and losing all lives ends the game. Walls block movement, forcing alternate routes. The UI indicates which modifier tiles are available and their positions relative to your current position.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate through grid-based levels, matching the shape, color, and rotation of your carried piece to the requirements of highlighted goal cells. Stepping onto a goal cell with the correct attributes completes it. Completing all goal cells in a level advances you to the next, and completing all levels wins the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: You start with a piece that has a shape, color, and rotation. The grid contains modifier tiles that change your piece's attributes when stepped on: shape modifiers cycle the shape, color modifiers cycle the color, and rotation modifiers rotate the piece 90° clockwise. Goal cells specify required shape, color, and rotation that must all match simultaneously. You move in four directions (north, south, east, west), each move consuming stamina. Running out of stamina costs a life, and losing all lives ends the game. Walls block movement, forcing alternate routes. The UI indicates which modifier tiles are available and their positions relative to your current position.
